info.name: School Edu Sphere
info.description: Student API collection (Students, Parents, Academic Records).

  }
}

request.description:
Create a student — full payload showing every accepted field. Required: schoolId, name. gender: MALE|FEMALE|OTHER. status: ACTIVE|INACTIVE|SUSPENDED|ALUMNI.

Guardians (optional): each entry is either an existing guardian by `guardianId`, OR a new person (name/relation/phone/email/address/occupation) that is de-duplicated server-side (reused when name+phone or name+email already exists in the school). A supplied `guardianId` must reference an existing guardian in the SAME school — otherwise the request fails (404 if the guardian does not exist, 400 if it belongs to another school). relation: FATHER|MOTHER|GRANDFATHER|GRANDMOTHER|UNCLE|AUNT|LEGAL_GUARDIAN|SIBLING|OTHER. Flags primary/emergencyContact/pickupApproved/portalAccess default to false (first guardian defaults to primary when unset).

Academic placement (optional): use the nested `currentAcademicRecord` object shown here, OR the equivalent top-level fields `academicYear`, `classDocId` (alias `classId`), `sectionId`, `rollNo`. classDocId must be a valid Class Mongo ObjectId in the same school. If academic placement is omitted entirely, no academic record is created and it can be assigned later via POST /api/students/{id}/academic-records (the recommended inquiry→admission→student flow). id and audit timestamps are server-owned and ignored if sent.

Create a student from an admission. Same as 'Convert Admission To Student' but the admission is referenced by `admissionId` in the BODY (required) instead of the URL. The body mirrors the create-student payload; schoolId and academicYear are accepted for parity but IGNORED — the school comes from the admission, and the academic year is NOT set at conversion (an admission carries no year); assign it afterwards via POST /api/students/{id}/academic-records. Guardians are copied from the admission and de-duplicated.

request.description: Convert an admission (id in the URL) into an enrolled student. The body mirrors the create-student payload — the frontend prefills name/admissionNo/dob/gender/admissionDate from the admission and bloodGroup is entered here. schoolId and academicYear are accepted for payload parity but IGNORED: the school comes from the admission, and the academic year is NOT set at conversion (an admission carries no year) — assign it afterwards via POST /api/students/{id}/academic-records. Guardians are copied from the admission automatically and de-duplicated (reused when name+phone or name+email exists).

exec: pm.test("Direct admission is not linked to an inquiry", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().inquiryDocsId).to.be.oneOf([null, undefined]); });

request.description: // Test case 2: Direct admission with every client-editable field. No inquiry must be read or updated.
